summary: Comprehensive testing of Yrvante premium business website rebuild. All 14 features tested - Backend APIs (15/15 tests passed), Frontend UI (14/14 features working). New pricing structure (€500/€900/€1400), testimonials slider, FAQ accordion, newsletter signup, contact form with phone field, and SEO files all functional.

issues: Newsletter success message displays on local state but quick timeout - works correctly but message is brief

passed_tests: 1. Homepage hero section loads with premium design - stats (50+, 100%, 24/7), floating elements, CTAs
2. Services section with 4 service cards (Website Development, Web Applications, UI/UX Design, SEO & Marketing)
3. Pricing section shows 3 packages: Basis (€500), Pro (€900), Premium (€1400) with 'Meest Gekozen' badge on Pro
4. Testimonials slider works - next/prev buttons functional, indicator dots change, reviews from Jan de Vries, Lisa Jansen, Mark Peters
5. FAQ accordion works - 5 questions, click to expand/collapse, answers visible when expanded
6. Newsletter signup form works - email validation, success message shown after submission
7. Contact form includes phone field (Telefoonnummer), validation works, honeypot hidden for spam protection
8. Navigation sticky header works on scroll - backdrop blur and shadow applied
9. Navigation smooth scroll to sections works (Diensten, Pakketten, FAQ, Contact)
10. Language toggle NL/EN works - switches between Dutch and English content
11. /calculator page shows new packages (€500, €900, €1400) and add-ons (€40 extra page, €100 multilang, €80 form, €20/mnd maintenance, €180 booking, €80 Google Reviews)
12. /pakketten page shows detailed package information with 'Meest Gekozen' badge, ideal customer segments
13. SEO files accessible: /sitemap.xml returns valid XML with 5 URLs, /robots.txt accessible
14. Mobile responsive navigation - hamburger menu opens/closes, shows all nav items + language toggle + CTA
backend_tests_passed: API root endpoint returns 200 with correct message
Contact form submission with phone field works
Contact form without optional phone works
Contact form validates required fields (name, email, message)
Admin login with correct password (yrvante2025) works
Admin stats endpoint returns all metrics
Contact mark as read functionality works
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for key components
Contact form honeypot spam protection correctly hidden with display:none
Backend properly validates email format with Pydantic EmailStr
CORS configured correctly for cross-origin requests
seed_data_creation: Test contact submissions created during testing (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium business website fully functional. New pricing: Basis €500, Pro €900, Premium €1400. Features tested: testimonials slider (3 reviews), FAQ accordion (5 questions), newsletter signup, contact form with phone field, honeypot spam protection, sticky header, smooth scroll, language toggle NL/EN, mobile hamburger menu. Backend: contact API, admin endpoints, analytics tracking all working. SEO: sitemap.xml and robots.txt accessible.

packages.Basis: €500 - 3 pages, responsive, basic contact, 6 revision rounds
packages.Pro: €900 - 10 pages, SEO, blog, portfolio, contact form
packages.Premium: €1400 - 15 pages, booking system, Google Reviews, multi-language, priority support
